important_wrappers.help: Continue chat/local transfer communication through the safest available wrapper path.
Create a deterministic successor handoff package and prompt projections.
Regenerate the agentic-kit command reference without committing changes.
Check whether the committed agentic-kit command reference is current.
Synchronize main, acknowledge rules, and normalize the session.
Write the current diff to /tmp and run the Python protected change planner on it.
Create a PR and complete it without requiring manual PR-number or SHA copying.

rules: LLM-to-local transfer payloads must be written as Python source files with the .py.txt suffix.
The Python payload must remain syntactically compilable before local execution.
Do not put raw gh, GitHub API, or direct GitHub shell commands into LLM-to-local payloads or user copy/paste blocks.
GitHub, PR, merge, evidence, release, and transfer operations should be invoked through repo-backed agentic-kit wrappers.
Direct gh or GitHub commands are allowed only inside audited repo-backed wrappers or explicit recovery/diagnostic implementation work.
Copy/paste is a fallback lane; prefer transfer files and wrapper-first commands.
